productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunarswift+ 3 Shield Grey Sports Shoes
description: Seamless comfort coupled with excellent cushioning system, the nike nike Lunarswift+ 3 Shield shoe is a must have for all enthusiastic runnersUpperSeamless synthetic leather upper for lightweight comfort and durability Synthetic leather Nike swoosh overlays on the midfoot region for added shoe structure Lacing system with a padded tongueMildly padded heel collar with fabric inner lining Heel counter moulded onto the shoe and wrapped around the rear foot for added stabilityMoulded sockliner anatomically placed for underfoot cushioning and ergonomic comfortMidsoleLow profile midsole made of Lunarlon cushioning for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning and soft, responsive shock absorptionDynamic Support System to adapt to your strideOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle lugs for enhanced grip and tractionImpact guidance line for distribution of impact and enhanced energy returnWash careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
